recommendations: Incorporate zone-2 aerobic training to improve cardiac efficiency.

diet: Ensure adequate magnesium and potassium intake for heart rhythm stability.
High-antioxidant diet (berries, dark leafy greens) to support vascular health.

analysis.message: Observation: Low risk profile based on current physiological data. Maintain standard wellness protocols.
clinical: ST segment depression suggests potential exercise-induced ischemia.
Bilateral blood pressure monitoring required. Target threshold: <120/80 mmHg.
Heart rate variability (HRV) analysis recommended to assess autonomic function.
dietary: DASH diet implementation: restrictive sodium (<1.5g) and high potassium intake.
lifestyle: Stress-reduction protocols: 20min daily mindfulness or controlled breathing.
Zone 2 aerobic conditioning: 150min/week at 60-70% of peak heart rate.
